theme.description: Hybrid design: A pristine, high-contrast light theme for public marketing/auth pages conveying trust, transitioning into a deeply immersive, 'futuristic dark' theme for the authenticated app (dashboard/chat) focusing on deep navy backgrounds, glassmorphism, and glowing accents.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-4, p-6, p-8 for inner card paddings, and py-12 to py-24 for marketing sections.

public_pages.grid: Bento grid (Tetris style) with asymmetrical layouts

app_pages.sidebar: Mini-sidebar collapsing to icons, dark surface, glowing active states, bordered by border-white/10
app_pages.header: Glassmorphism sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050514]/70 in dark mode)
app_pages.content: Dense 'Control Room' bento grid with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF6B5B] to-[#E11D2C] text-white hover:brightness-110 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg shadow-[#FF6B5B]/20
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#1A1A6B] text-[#1A1A6B] dark:border-white/20 dark:text-white dark:hover:bg-white/5

cards.dark: bg-[#0B0B20] border border-white/5 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl hover:border-white/10 transition-colors

chat_interface.user_bubble: bg-[#1A1A6B] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-3 shadow-md
chat_interface.ai_bubble: bg-transparent text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 px-5 py-3 border-l-2 border-[#FF6B5B]
chat_interface.citation_chip: inline-flex items-center text-xs bg-gray-100 dark:bg-white/5 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10 rounded-full px-3 py-1 mt-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-[#FF6B5B] dark:hover:text-[#FF6B5B] hover:border-[#FF6B5B]/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors
chat_interface.input_area: bg-white dark:bg-[#0B0B20] border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10 rounded-full pl-6 pr-2 py-2 flex items-center shadow-lg dark:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,107,91,0.05)]
chat_interface.voice_button: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF6B5B] to-[#E11D2C] text-white rounded-full p-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform shadow-lg shadow-[#FF6B5B]/30
chat_interface.portal_chip: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-[#1A1A6B]/10 dark:bg-[#1A1A6B]/30 text-[#1A1A6B] dark:text-[#FF6B5B] rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#1A1A6B]/20 transition-colors cursor-pointer

forms.input: bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#12123A] border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B5B] focus:border-transparent transition-all
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 mb-1.5

badges.region: bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-300 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10

motion.chat_bubbles: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, chat components, chips) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind config with the custom colors (navy, coral, red) under the 'extend.colors' section.
Include 'Outfit' (for headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (for body) from Google Fonts in index.html.

Implement the 'Hybrid' mode architecture: auth/landing pages strictly use the light theme styling, while the authenticated app (dashboard, chat, HR/Admin) strictly uses the dark futuristic styling as defined in dark_mode variables.
The chat interface must feel alive: implement a typewriter effect for AI text streaming, smooth Framer Motion list additions for chat messages, and styled citation chips.
Always use 'data-testid' on interactive elements for automated testing compatibility.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are customized to eliminate standard Vercel styles; apply our rounded-xl, glassmorphism, and color borders.
